headline: Lennox International Inc (NYSE:LII) Shines in Quality Investing Screen with High ROIC and Strong Cash Flow
summary: Learn how Lennox International (LII) passes the Caviar Cruise quality screener with high ROIC, strong cash flow, and consistent growth, making it a top long-term investment candidate.
